extract_constraints_instruction.title: $config.extract_constraints_instruction
extract_constraints_instruction.text:
Ты — логический аналитик. Извлеки все атомарные утверждения/факты из текста.
Верни ТОЛЬКО в формате:
ENTITIES: [сущность1, сущность2, ...]
AXIOMS:
- утверждение 1
- утверждение 2
HYPOTHESES:
- гипотеза 1

Требования:
- AXIOMS = факты, данные как условие.
- HYPOTHESES = выводы, предположения.
- Каждое утверждение атомарное и короткое.
- Не выводи прозу или JSON.
- Отвечай на языке текста.

fn-quick_check.title: quick_check

prompt_answer_table_rows.title: $config.prompt_answer_table_rows
prompt_answer_table_rows.text:
Write exactly $config.target_rows candidate prompts that answer the user's request.

Rules:
- Output exactly $config.target_rows items
- Each item must be one prompt only
- Number them as 1. 2. 3. ...
- No intro, no outro, no markdown headings
- Keep each prompt self-contained
- Follow the user's constraints closely

prompt_claims.title: $config.prompt_claims
prompt_claims.text:
Ты — логический аналитик. Извлеки все атомарные утверждения/факты из текста.
Верни ТОЛЬКО в формате:
ENTITIES: [сущность1, сущность2, ...]
AXIOMS:
- утверждение 1
- утверждение 2
HYPOTHESES:
- гипотеза 1

Требования:
- AXIOMS = факты, данные как условие.
- HYPOTHESES = выводы, предположения.
- Каждое утверждение атомарное и короткое.
- Не выводи прозу или JSON.
- Отвечай на языке текста.

Текст для анализа:
@input

prompt_constraints_axioms_seed.title: $config.prompt_constraints_axioms_seed
prompt_constraints_axioms_seed.text:
Known ENTITIES:
@entities

Read @input and extract only AXIOMS.
AXIOMS are explicit checks, conditions, required facts, or hard constraints from the request.
Do not include hypotheses.

Return JSON array only.
Rules:
- short atomic checks
- no commentary
- no code fences

prompt_constraints_axioms_tail.title: $config.prompt_constraints_axioms_tail
prompt_constraints_axioms_tail.text:
Known ENTITIES:
@entities

Known AXIOMS:
@known

Read @input again.
Return only additional AXIOMS missing from the known set.
If none are missing, return [].

Return JSON array only.
Rules:
- do not repeat known axioms
- do not add hypotheses
- short atomic checks

prompt_constraints_entities_seed.title: $config.prompt_constraints_entities_seed
prompt_constraints_entities_seed.text:
Read @input and extract only candidate ENTITIES for later structured verification.

Return JSON array only.
Example: ["subject", "style", "eye color"]
Rules:
- short labels
- no commentary
- no code fences

prompt_constraints_entities_tail.title: $config.prompt_constraints_entities_tail
prompt_constraints_entities_tail.text:
Known ENTITIES:
@known

Read @input again.
Return only additional ENTITIES missing from the known set.
If none are missing, return [].

Return JSON array only.
Rules:
- no duplicates from known set
- short labels
- no commentary

prompt_constraints_hypotheses_seed.title: $config.prompt_constraints_hypotheses_seed
prompt_constraints_hypotheses_seed.text:
Known ENTITIES:
@entities

Known AXIOMS:
@axioms

Read @input and extract only HYPOTHESES.
HYPOTHESES are inferred, uncertain, optional, or rejection-reason style checks that are useful later but are not explicit hard axioms.

Return JSON array only.
Rules:
- short labels
- no commentary
- no code fences

prompt_constraints_hypotheses_tail.title: $config.prompt_constraints_hypotheses_tail
prompt_constraints_hypotheses_tail.text:
Known ENTITIES:
@entities

Known AXIOMS:
@axioms

Known HYPOTHESES:
@known

Read @input again.
Return only additional HYPOTHESES missing from the known set.
If none are missing, return [].

Return JSON array only.
Rules:
- do not repeat known hypotheses
- do not restate hard axioms
- short labels

prompt_constraints_strict.title: $config.prompt_constraints_strict
prompt_constraints_strict.text:
Extract a compact constraint manifest from the user request.

Return exactly this format:
ENTITIES:
- column 1
- column 2

AXIOMS:
- check 1
- check 2

HYPOTHESES:
- reason 1
- reason 2

Rules:
- ENTITIES are table columns for each candidate prompt
- AXIOMS are binary checks for accept or reject
- HYPOTHESES are short rejection-reason columns
- No commentary
- No code fences
- Keep labels short

prompt_table.title: $config.prompt_table
prompt_table.text:
Ты — экстрактор данных. Распарси текст в структурированную таблицу.
Верни markdown-таблицу с подходящими колонками.
Если есть сущности со свойствами: | Сущность | Свойство1 | Свойство2 |
Если список: | # | Элемент | Детали |

Текст:
@input
